---
title: "semantic_telemetry.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\semantic_telemetry.py"
loc: 8
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.95
style_score: 9.51
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.82
---

## Intent
The `semantic_telemetry.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 2 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
